title: Marvell Cloud Data Center Ethernet Switch Port Shipments Grow Greater than 100% Year over Year
text: Over 3 Million Marvell 400G Switch Ports Shipped to Date Based on 650 Group's Latest Quarterly Switch Report SANTA CLARA, Calif. , April 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell (NASDAQ: MRVL) today announced that it has more than doubled its growth year-over-year (YOY) in cloud data center Ethernet switch port shipments, based on 650 Group's quarterly switch report for Q4'21 released last month.
